summary: Rough performance plagued by out‑of‑tune guitar and equipment woes, with no clear info on recording fidelity
review: The show is described as problematic throughout, with Bob Weir notably out of tune and battling gear issues. While a few moments are praised as decent, the overall impression is that this is one of the weaker entries from an otherwise strong spring/summer run, and the recording quality isn’t specifically addressed.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single low‑star review mentioning poor performance; no concrete details on recording quality, leading to a modest rating weighted toward the weak show.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not comment on audio clarity or mix; overall impression suggests the recording is not a redeeming factor.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure; reviewer notes general problems across the entire show.

band_member_comments.Bob: Out of tune and struggling with equipment throughout the performance
